description: Shared Renovate policy for turfbuild repos. Consume with "extends": ["github>turfbuild/.github:renovate-config"]. Fork module paths + fork submodules are managed via the fork-rebase flow (docs/development/fork-maintenance.md), never by Renovate.

packageRules.description: Fork-governed deps move ONLY via the fork-rebase flow (fork-maintenance.md / /dep-upgrade), never Renovate. Covers the OpenTofu forks (opentofu, provider-client, svchost, registry-address, and the opentofu/hcl/v2 fork that github.com/hashicorp/hcl/v2 is replaced with), the shared zclconf/go-cty type stack (MVS picks the max and the fork compiles from source against it, so a bump ahead of the fork can break its compile), the CLI's docker-agent/cagent fork, and tfcoremock. Listing a path a repo does not use is a harmless no-op.

Indirect Go deps are the fork's transitive closure (derived from ./opentofu via go mod tidy); they move with the fork, not Renovate. This is also Renovate's default — pinned explicitly so the policy is legible.
Group non-major Go dependency bumps into one PR to cut noise; each is gated by the security + CI checks.
Keep pinned GitHub Actions current but grouped.

git-submodules.description: Fork submodules are fork-flow-managed, not Renovate-bumped. This manager is disabled by default (beta/opt-in); pinned off explicitly so the intent survives any default change.
